title: selaginella nepalesis
intro: Selaginella nepalesis, also known as Nepalese spikemoss, is a species of vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella nepalesis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
